subject: URGENT: Your account has been suspended - Verify immediately
body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We have detected unusual activity on your PayPal account. Your account has been temporarily suspended.

To restore access to your account, please verify your identity immediately by clicking the link below:

http://192.168.1.100/paypal/verify?user=victim@company.com

If you do not verify within 24 hours, your account will be permanently closed.

PayPal Security Team
